title: kaempferia purpurea
intro: Kaempferia purpurea, also known as Krachai Dam or Thai Galangal, is a type of ginger plant native to Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Kaempferia purpurea include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Kaempferia purpurea is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, or dried and used in soups and stews, and is also used as an ingredient in traditional Thai dishes.
